acceptance_criteria.text: Learning Loop is versioned and human-gated: feedback from edits, rejections, bad outcomes, and errors creates candidate blueprint versions with diff, activation, and rollback.
proof: Feedback endpoint stores typed trigger_type and learning_loop metadata.
Feedback creates candidate agent_blueprint_versions and returns diff.
UI sends auto_activate: false and presents candidate activation explicitly.
UI exposes manual edit, rejected approval, bad outcome, runtime error, and manual feedback triggers.
build_learning_loop_summary returns agent_learning_loop_v1 with versioned_review mode.
Architecture docs define Learning Loop v1.
Backend deployed to /opt/seo-app/src and app/worker restarted.
Frontend dist deployed with live asset /assets/index-DrgkSUe8.js.
Production checks passed: docker compose ps, app logs, curl -I http://localhost:8000, live frontend asset smoke.
Production route/source smoke passed: feedback route is registered as POST; container source contains agent_learning_loop_v1 and auto_activate.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: ssh ... "cd /opt/seo-app && docker compose restart app worker"
ssh ... "cd /opt/seo-app && docker compose ps && curl -I http://localhost:8000 && docker compose exec -T app python3 - <<'PY' ..."
deployment_notes: Frontend deploy emitted transient tar file-changed warnings during archive streaming, but final verification passed.
frontend/public/yandex_9f7f92ca02ef161c.html was included in generated dist because it exists in Vite public, but it remains untracked and uncommitted.
